issues.sample: WHEN I GOT IN MY CAR THE CHECK ENGINE CAN ON. I STARTED DRIVING MY CAR TO WORK, BECAUSE I WAS NOT SURE WHY THIS LIGHT CAME ON BECAUSE THIS WAS/IS A NEW CAR. I HAVE LESS THAN 19K MILES ON MY CAR. AS I ATTEMPTED TO GET ON THE HIGHWAY THE CAR REFUSED TO SPEED UP. THE MAX THAT I COUL

THIS HAS OCCURRED ON 3 TIMES SO FAR. I WAS AT A GAS STATION FILLING UP THE TANK, THE KEY WAS IN THE IGNITION, THE CAR WAS IN PARK, THE ENGINE WAS RUNNING,  AND MY CAR DOOR WAS CLOSED.  WHEN I FINISHED GETTING GAS, I TRIED TO OPEN THE DRIVER SIDE DOOR AND IT WAS LOCKED. ALL DOORS

SATURDAY, JANUARY 20, 18:55(APPROXIMATELY)  AMHERST MASSACHUSETTS, 39 DEGREES FAHRENHEIT  PARKED CAR, PULLED KEYS AND EXITED CAR TO HELP MY MOTHER EXIT.  PARKED ON INCLINE, VEHICLE STARTED ROLLING BACK DOWN DRIVEWAY  HAD KEYS IN POCKET AUTOMATIC TRANSMISSION VEHICLE  TRIED MOVING

TAKATA RECALL. I WAS INVOLVED IN AN ACCIDENT WHERE I WAS COMING OFF THE HIGHWAY, SLID ON WATER AND CRASHED INTO A STEEL POLE. THE BREAKS DID NOT WORK AT ALL AND WHEN I GOT OUT TO LOOK AT THE DAMAGE THE BREAK PADS WERE IN THE MIDDLE OF THE STREET LIKE THEY HAD JUST FALL OFF. NONE

I HAVE THE KIA OPTIMA SX WITH THE TECHNOLOGY PACKAGE THAT COMES EQUIPPED WITH THE AUTO-LEVELING AND AUTO-BENDING LED HEADLAMPS. I BELIEVE THAT THE AUTO-LEVELING FUNCTION IS WORKING INCORRECTLY. WHEN WEIGHT IS ADDED TO THE CAR (MORE PASSENGERS) THE BEAM PATTERN AUTO ADJUSTS ITSELF

narrative.headline: 2018 Kia Optima: engine trouble dominates owner complaints
narrative.summary: Of 224 complaints owners filed with NHTSA, the engine is by far the biggest concern, named in 127 reports (57%) including 9 that involved a fire. After that, owners flag electrical glitches (33 reports), then powertrain, brake, and headlight issues. If you're buying, have the engine checked closely and ask about any fire-related history.

issues.title: Engine
issues.blurb: The top complaint by a wide margin: 127 reports (57% of all complaints), and 9 of them involved a fire. Get the engine inspected before you buy.

issues.sample: THIS HAS OCCURRED ON 3 TIMES SO FAR. I WAS AT A GAS STATION FILLING UP THE TANK, THE KEY WAS IN THE IGNITION, THE CAR WAS IN PARK, THE ENGINE WAS RUNNING,  AND MY CAR DOOR WAS CLOSED.  WHEN I FINISHED GETTING GAS, I TRIED TO OPEN THE DRIVER SIDE DOOR AND IT WAS LOCKED. ALL DOORS
issues.title: Electrical System
issues.blurb: The second most common area: 33 reports (15%), including 2 that involved a fire. Test the electronics and watch for warning lights.

issues.title: Power Train
issues.blurb: 18 reports (8%), with 1 crash, 1 fire, and 2 people injured. Worth a careful drivetrain check given the injuries involved.

issues.title: Service Brakes
issues.blurb: 16 reports (7%), tied to 2 crashes and 1 injury. Have the brakes tested thoroughly on any car you consider.

issues.title: Exterior Lighting
issues.blurb: 14 reports (6%), one involving a fire. Check that all exterior lights work correctly during a test drive.
